creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Side note
---------

<https://klarasystems.com/articles/the-freebsd-boot-process/> mentions 

> … the iconic “Beastie Menu”, …

Modern systems default to the orb icon (part of the FreeBSD Project logo); not the BSD daemon a.k.a. beastie. 

<https://freebsdfoundation.org/about-us/about-the-foundation/project/>

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/c807217cf2ff03a8f31087ddadb68be1045b3815>

<https://new.reddit.com/gallery/rk4ktm>

<https://www.mckusick.com/beastie/index.html>
